title: HVAC Parts Inventory Tools Review: service Titan vs Field Edge vs Gorilla Desk - Small Business Comparison 2026
description: In-depth comparison of the top three HVAC parts inventory tools in 2026: service Titan, Field Edge, and Gorilla Desk. Comprehensive analysis covering inventory tracking, procurement management, parts costs, and inventory alerts. helps HVAC small businesses find the most suitable parts inventory solution to improve inventory management efficiency and cost control capabilities. Learn more about features and pricing comparisons to find your best solution!
author: Zhou Jianguo - HVAC Inventory Management Expert
content:
Background Introduction

Parts inventory is a critical component of HVAC business cost control and on-site service, directly impacting service efficiency, cost control, and customer satisfaction. Traditional HVAC businesses rely on paper inventory records and manual counting, resulting in inaccurate inventory data, delayed parts procurement, and difficult-to-control inventory costs. According to statistics, over 75% of HVAC small businesses lack a complete parts inventory system, with inventory data errors reaching 30% and parts procurement delays extending service response time by 20%. Digital parts inventory tools have completely transformed HVAC business inventory management models, with inventory tracking features recording parts quantities in real-time, procurement management features automatically reminding procurement needs, parts cost tracking features recording parts costs and profit margins, and inventory alert features reducing stockout risk. This article will provide an in-depth comparison of service Titan, Field Edge, and Gorilla Desk—the three major HVAC parts inventory tools—to help small businesses find the most suitable inventory solution.

Core Features Comparison

Features Moduleservice TitanField EdgeGorilla DeskComparison Analysis
Inventory trackingreal-time inventory quantity, automatic updateBasic inventory recordsSimple inventory informationservice Titan has most accurate inventory tracking
Procurement ManagementAutomatic procurement reminders, supplier connectionBasic procurement recordsManual procurement arrangementservice Titan has most professional procurement management
Parts costsParts cost tracking, profit analysisBasic cost recordscost information storageservice Titan has complete parts cost tracking
Inventory AlertsAutomatic inventory alerts, stockout remindersBasic inventory remindersSimple inventory remindersservice Titan has most complete inventory alerts

Supplier ManagementSupplier profiles, price comparisonSupplier information storageSupplier contact informationservice Titan has most complete supplier management
technician Inventorytechnician vehicle inventory trackingtechnician parts recordstechnician inventory informationservice Titan has most professional technician inventory tracking
Data AnalysisInventory efficiency analysis, cost trendsBasic inventory reportsSimple inventory statisticsservice Titan leads in data analysis

service Titan Parts Inventory In-depth Review

service Titan's parts inventory system is recognized as the most professional solution in the HVAC industry. real-time inventory tracking features automatically record parts quantities, with the system automatically updating inventory quantities after technicians use parts on-site. Automatic procurement reminder features automatically remind businesses to procure parts based on inventory quantities and procurement thresholds, and seamlessly connect with supplier platforms. Parts cost tracking features record parts procurement costs, usage costs, and profit margins, supporting cost control and profit analysis. Automatic inventory alert features automatically send stockout reminders based on inventory thresholds, reducing stockout risk. Parts type grouping features classify parts by type, specification, and manufacturer, supporting batch management and filtering. Supplier profile features store supplier information, procurement prices, and supply cycles, supporting price comparison and supplier selection. technician vehicle inventory tracking features record parts quantities in technician vehicles, automatically updating vehicle inventory after technicians use parts on-site. Inventory efficiency analysis features provide inventory turnover rate, stockout rate, cost trends, and procurement efficiency reports. service Titan monthly fees start at $398, suitable for medium to large enterprises with annual revenue of $5 million or more.

  • real-time Inventory tracking: Automatic inventory quantity update
  • Automatic Procurement reminders: reduces stockout risk
  • Parts cost tracking: Complete cost control
  • Supplier Management: price comparison and connection
  • technician Inventory tracking: Vehicle parts management

Field Edge Parts Inventory Review

Field Edge's parts inventory system is known for cost-effectiveness and basic features. Basic inventory record features record parts quantities, requiring technicians to manually update inventory information. Basic procurement record features record procurement information, requiring businesses to manually arrange procurement. Basic cost record features record parts cost information. Basic inventory reminder features support setting inventory threshold reminders, but lack automatic alerts. Basic parts classification features support parts type marking. Supplier information storage features record supplier contact information. technician parts record features record parts information in technician vehicles. Basic inventory report features provide inventory quantity and procurement statistics. Field Edge monthly fees start at $125, suitable for small to medium businesses with annual revenue of $500,000 to $3 million.

  • Basic Inventory records: Parts quantity storage
  • High cost-effectiveness: monthly fees start at $125
  • Good Ease of Use: Quick setup
  • Basic Procurement records: Procurement information management
  • Basic Inventory reminders: Stockout reminder features

Gorilla Desk Parts Inventory Review

Gorilla Desk's parts inventory system is known for simplicity and low pricing, suitable for HVAC small business entry. Simple inventory information features record basic parts information. Manual procurement arrangement features require businesses to manually arrange procurement. cost information storage features record parts costs. Simple inventory reminder features support basic reminders. Simple parts type marking features support parts classification. Supplier contact information features record supplier information. technician inventory information features record technician vehicle parts. Simple inventory statistics features provide inventory quantity statistics. Gorilla Desk monthly fees start at $49, suitable for small businesses with annual revenue under $300,000.

  • Low-price Entry: monthly fees start at $49
  • Simple and Easy: Quick setup
  • Inventory Information Storage: Basic recording
  • suitable for Starting: Small team entry
  • Simple Statistics: Inventory quantity recording

Small Business Selection Recommendations

For HVAC small businesses, parts inventory tool selection should comprehensively consider enterprise scale, inventory complexity, and cost control needs. Small businesses with annual revenue under $300,000 should consider Gorilla Desk, with low-price entry suitable for establishing basic inventory record processes. Small to medium businesses with annual revenue of $500,000 to $3 million should consider Field Edge, with balanced cost-effectiveness and basic inventory features. Large enterprises with annual revenue exceeding $5 million should consider service Titan, with real-time inventory tracking and automatic procurement reminders supporting professional inventory management. Regardless of which tool is chosen, HVAC businesses should fully utilize inventory tracking features to reduce inventory errors and improve service response efficiency.

2026 Development Trend Forecast

HVAC parts inventory tools will show three major development trends in 2026. First, AI intelligent procurement will mature, with tools automatically predicting procurement needs based on historical usage data, seasonal changes, and service trends, reducing human decision-making. Second, supplier platform deep integration will become popular, with tools seamlessly connecting with supplier platforms to automatically order procurement and track order status. Third, technician inventory real-time tracking will emerge, with tools real-time tracking parts quantities in technician vehicles, automatically updating inventory after technicians use parts on-site and generating procurement reminders. HVAC small businesses should closely monitor these trends and choose tools supporting intelligent procurement and supplier connection to improve inventory management efficiency.

faq.question: How does HVAC parts inventory tool real-time tracking feature work?
faq.answer: service Titan's real-time inventory tracking feature automatically records parts quantities, with the system automatically updating inventory quantities after technicians use parts on-site. technician vehicle inventory tracking features record parts in technician vehicles, automatically updating after on-site use. Field Edge and Gorilla Desk require technicians to manually update inventory information.

faq.question: What value does automatic procurement reminder feature provide?
faq.answer: service Titan's automatic procurement reminder feature automatically reminds businesses to procure parts based on inventory quantities and procurement thresholds, and connects with supplier platforms to automatically order. reduces stockout risk and service delays. Field Edge and Gorilla Desk require manual procurement arrangement. We recommend choosing tools supporting automatic procurement reminders.

faq.question: How should HVAC small businesses choose parts inventory tools?
faq.answer: Small businesses with annual revenue under $300,000 should consider Gorilla Desk, with low-price entry suitable for establishing basic inventory records. Small to medium businesses with annual revenue of $500,000 to $3 million should consider Field Edge, with balanced cost-effectiveness and basic inventory features. Those exceeding $5 million should consider service Titan, with real-time tracking and automatic procurement supporting professional management.

faq.question: How does parts cost tracking feature help?
faq.answer: Parts cost tracking features record parts procurement costs, usage costs, and profit margins, supporting cost control and profit analysis. service Titan's parts cost tracking feature is most complete, helping businesses optimize parts pricing and cost control. We recommend utilizing cost tracking features to improve parts profitability.

faq.question: What value does technician inventory tracking feature provide?
faq.answer: technician inventory tracking features record parts quantities in technician vehicles, automatically updating vehicle inventory after technicians use parts on-site. service Titan's technician inventory tracking feature is most professional, helping businesses grasp technician parts usage and timely replenish. We recommend utilizing technician inventory tracking features to improve on-site service efficiency.
